data.title: U.S. SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce: Meme Coin Regulatory Committee Can Be Established
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: US SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce said in a speech at the Bitcoin 2025 Conference, "I think Meme coins are more like collectibles. Knowing that participants in Meme coins are not protected by securities laws, I think we will provide more guidance in this regard. I think the Meme Coin Regulatory Committee can be established, and regulatory gaps must always be filled."

data.title: Kazakhstan to launch cryptocurrency payments in ‘crypto city’
data.description:
Kazakhstan intends to pilot cryptocurrency payments as part of a new policy of regulating rather than banning transactions with digital assets like Bitcoin. The news from the Central Asian nation, which has established itself as a crypto mining hub, comes amid government efforts to legalize crypto-related operations. Kazakhstan to permit crypto payments in pilot mode […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/kazakhstan-to-launch-cryptocurrency-payments/

data.title: If Bitcoin Price Loses $107K Support, It May Slip To…
data.description:
Bitcoin price went through a topsy-turvy phase lately, after hitting a new ATH recently. Although BTC soaring past the $111k mark has fueled speculations over a continuing rally, the recent consolidated movements have raised concerns. Amid this, renowned market experts are eyeing the $107k level as a brief support for the flagship crypto
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/05/29/if-bitcoin-price-loses-107k-support-it-may-slip-to/

data.title: Fed: Powell met with Trump at the White House, but did not discuss expectations for monetary policy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Federal Reserve said that at the invitation of the US President, Federal Reserve Chairman Powell met with the President at the White House today to discuss economic developments, including growth, employment, and inflation. Powell did not discuss his expectations for monetary policy, but emphasized that the policy path will depend entirely on upcoming economic information and its significance for the outlook. Finally, Powell said that he and his colleagues on the Federal Open Market Committee will formulate monetary policy in accordance with legal requirements to support maximum employment and stable prices, and will make these decisions entirely based on careful, objective and non-political analysis. (Jinshi)

data.title: Federal Reserve Chair Meets with Trump to Discuss Economic Issues
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell met with U.S. President Donald Trump at the White House to discuss various economic issues, including growth, employment, and inflation.

Powell did not provide specific forecasts regarding monetary policy but emphasized that future policy decisions will depend entirely on upcoming economic data and its impact on the economic outlook.

Powell concluded by stating that he and his colleagues at the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) will formulate monetary policy in accordance with the law to support maximum employment and price stability. All decisions will be based on careful, objective analysis, free from political influence.

data.title: Uniswap Foundation provides $235,000 in funding to ChainHopper development team
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Uniswap Foundation announced on the X platform that it would provide funding to the development team of the cross-chain LP migration protocol ChainHopper. The protocol will support one-click migration of Uniswap liquidity providers (LP) positions to different EVM chains, and will help migrate liquidity to Unichain and the upcoming Uniswap v4. It is reported that the Uniswap Foundation has provided $235,000 in funding to Melio for the development of the ChainHopper protocol. Currently, the protocol has been launched on the mainnet, Unichain, Base, Arbitrum and Optimism.

data.title: Federal judge in Washington orders 14-day suspension of tariffs
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Washington District Court followed the previous ruling of the US Trade Court, and a federal judge in Washington ordered a 14-day suspension of the tariff order. (Jinshi)
